auto.name: Auto
auto.description: Automatic time and weather selection inferred from intent, lighting pack, environment, and narrative constraints, ensuring physical coherence and realistic light behavior.
auto.prompt_fragment: time of day and weather automatically inferred for realistic lighting and atmosphere

blue_hour_winter.name: Blue hour winter
blue_hour_winter.description: Cold twilight conditions just after sunset, with blue ambient light and subtle warm practical accents, commonly used in winter fashion campaigns.
blue_hour_winter.prompt_fragment: blue hour winter twilight with cold ambient light and subtle warm accents

bright_midday_sun.name: Bright midday sun
bright_midday_sun.description: High sun angle with hard shadows and strong contrast, emphasizing structure, textures, and crisp edges.
bright_midday_sun.prompt_fragment: bright midday sunlight with hard shadows and high contrast

deep_night_snowfall.name: Deep night snowfall
deep_night_snowfall.description: Nighttime winter scene with falling snow visible in practical lights, low ambient exposure and cinematic atmosphere.
deep_night_snowfall.prompt_fragment: deep night snowfall with low ambient light and visible falling snow

foggy_morning.name: Foggy morning
foggy_morning.description: Early morning fog creating diffused light, reduced contrast, and soft silhouettes, often used for moody editorial narratives.
foggy_morning.prompt_fragment: foggy morning with diffused light, soft edges, and reduced contrast

golden_hour_clear.name: Golden hour clear
golden_hour_clear.description: Low-angle warm sunlight near sunset, producing long soft shadows and flattering skin tones.
golden_hour_clear.prompt_fragment: golden hour warm light with long soft shadows and clear sky

overcast_winter_daylight.name: Overcast winter daylight
overcast_winter_daylight.description: Cloud-covered winter daylight acting as a natural softbox, minimizing shadows and preserving color fidelity.
overcast_winter_daylight.prompt_fragment: overcast winter daylight with soft diffused light and neutral color temperature

rainy_urban.name: Rainy urban
rainy_urban.description: Rainy conditions with wet reflective surfaces and diffused city lighting, creating depth and cinematic reflections.
rainy_urban.prompt_fragment: rainy urban atmosphere with wet reflections and diffused city lights

studio_controlled.name: Studio controlled
studio_controlled.description: Fully controlled studio environment with no natural time or weather influence, ensuring repeatability and consistency.
studio_controlled.prompt_fragment: fully controlled studio conditions with no natural time or weather influence
